name: Lithium Argentina Corp.
description: Lithium Argentina AG is a resource company focused on the development and production of lithium to support the global energy transition. The company operates the Cauchari–Olaroz project in Argentina, which is one of the largest lithium brine operations globally, and is advancing the Pozuelos–Pastos Grandes project. By integrating conventional and emerging extraction technologies, Lithium Argentina aims to provide high-quality, cost-effective lithium for electric vehicles and large-scale energy storage systems. The company is committed to responsible production, sustainable practices, and strategic partnerships to meet the surging global demand for lithium while minimizing environmental and social impacts.
